framework.name: Cascading Failure Propagation Speed
framework.description: A single compromised agent poisoned 87% of downstream decision-making within four hours in simulated environments. This quantifies why delegation chains without depth limits are catastrophic — compromise at any hop propagates faster than humans can respond.
framework.raw_quote: single compromised agent poisoned 87% of downstream decision-making within four hours in simulated environments

source.title: When AI Agents Misbehave: Governance and Security for ... - Our Take
